_meta.title: EOFY Setup Tracker — initial seed
_meta.scope: critical-path-to-30-June, OPEN items only (already-done foundations excluded)
_meta.statusSource: wiki/synthesis/entity-migration-truth-state-2026-05-14.md + live Xero org check 2026-05-27 (sole-trader tenant only) + thoughts/shared/plans/act-entity-migration-checklist-2026-06-30.md
_meta.note: This is the one-time seed. After it lands in Notion, the Notion DB is the source of truth — edit statuses there, not here. Statuses dated 2026-05-14 may have advanced; confirm the P0s.

items.task: ABN application (Pty) issued via ABR
items.note: Lodged with ABR (per Ben 2026-05-27); awaiting issue. Pty Xero/NAB/invoicing unblock once the ABN actually issues.

items.task: GST registration (Pty)
items.note: Lodged with the ABN application (per Ben 2026-05-27); awaiting confirmation.

items.task: Draft + sign Shareholders Agreement (Knight FT / Marchesi FT)
items.note: OVERDUE — Rule 4 said Week 1-2. Two equal shareholders, no SHA = latent deadlock risk while Minderoo in DD.

items.task: Confirm Director IDs (Ben + Nic)
items.note: Unverified since baseline. Confirm both directors hold a Director ID.

items.task: Confirm trust deeds executed + TFN/ABN/bank (Knight FT + Marchesi FT)
items.note: Shareholders set ✅ — confirm deeds executed and each trust has TFN/ABN + bank if distributing.

items.task: Open Pty minute book + share register
items.note: First entries: registration, director appointments, share subscription by trusts, banking resolution.

items.task: Select insurance broker
items.note: OVERDUE (was Week 1). Blocks all policies below.

items.task: Bind Directors & Officers (D&O) insurance
items.note: OVERDUE — 30 days post-registration was ~24 May. Pty operates director-unprotected until bound. Most time-critical item.

items.task: Bind Public Liability $20M (Harvest lease)
items.note: Required before the Harvest lease is signed.

items.task: Bind Professional Indemnity
items.note: For first post-cutover consulting contract (Innovation Studio).

items.task: Open NAB business account (Pty)
items.note: OVERDUE — 2-week onboarding. Blocks Stripe, subscription migration, and the bank details needed for novation letters.

items.task: Issue Pty expense / credit cards (founder + staff)
items.note: Cards under the Pty business account. Also set up PayID/Osko on the account.

items.task: Open Stripe account for Pty
items.note: Stripe prefers a new account under the new ABN.

items.task: Audit + migrate auto-debits to Pty account
items.note: Every recurring direct debit on the sole-trader account → Pty account after 1 July.

items.task: Open Pty Xero file (chart of accounts + tracking categories)
items.note: BLOCKED on ABN. Live check 2026-05-27: only the sole-trader tenant exists in Xero. Playbook ready: thoughts/shared/plans/new-entity-xero-launch-playbook.md.

items.task: Set up Pty payroll (Ben + Nic, $10K/mo base + super)
items.note: BLOCKED on Pty Xero. Monthly or fortnightly (SL to recommend).

items.task: Open director's loan accounts (one per founder)
items.note: BLOCKED on Pty Xero. Document drawing rules so ATO doesn't deem a Division 7A loan.

items.task: Register PAYG withholding + Single Touch Payroll (Pty)
items.note: Required from first pay.

items.task: Set up super clearing house (11.5% FY26 → 12% FY27)
Decide FY26 founder pay catch-up
items.note: Neither founder has drawn salary this FY. Pay enough this FY to optimise R&D. Decide: Pty post-cutover only, or backdate via sole-trader invoice.

items.task: Finalise FY26 R&D evidence pack (~$354K, 4 registers)
items.note: Registers exist; grade WARN/62. Close the open warnings (contemporaneous records, classification).

items.task: R&D records review with dedicated R&D consultant
items.note: Plan scheduled end May. Select consultant. Verify contemporaneous records support the claim.

items.task: Knight Photography Phase 1 invoice ($100K) + Xero entry
items.note: R&D attribution depends on it. Matches the 6 Oct 2025 $100K transfers. Director's-loan journal via SL.

items.task: Lodge final sole-trader Q4 FY26 BAS
items.note: Q4 runs Apr–Jun, due 28 July. Last sole-trader BAS; then cancel ABN/GST.

items.task: Clear untagged Xero review queue (~246 rows)
items.note: Blocks mapping accuracy. Coverage ~97.5%; finish the residual before SL reviews the mapping.

items.task: Standard Ledger reviews sole-trader → Pty mapping
items.note: Mapping export ✅ generated (2,879 lines). SL confirms reallocation principle, then books cross-entity journals.

items.task: Enumerate active sole-trader grants (funders-to-notify list)
items.note: Blocks novation letters. Partial via Q1 funder synthesis. Snow / PRF / Lord Mayor's / Dusseldorp / Equity Trustees + grant register.

items.task: Send novation letters to funders
items.note: Template DRAFTED (novation-letter-templates.md). BLOCKED on SL review + ABN + NAB bank details.

items.task: Draft Harvest subsidiary structure + confirm lease counterparty
items.note: Separate Pty subsidiary, landlord as minority shareholder. Sonas already invoiced $37,290. Lease in subsidiary name.

items.task: Novate customer relationships (Innovation Studio / JusticeHub / Goods buyers)
items.note: Audit assignment clauses for the 19 Goods buyers — some need prior written consent, not just notice.

items.task: New Farm lease (Nic ↔ Pty, arm's-length market rate)
items.note: Draft new lease, Nic lessor / Pty lessee. SL confirms rate.

items.task: Decide Centrecorp INV-0314 DRAFT ($84,700)
items.note: 90+ days as DRAFT. Affects Minderoo pitch credibility. Ben-only decision: issue or drop.

items.task: IP clause audit on grant + partnership agreements
items.note: Blocks the IP deed. Verify Nic holds clean title to assign (Commonwealth grants may contain IP clauses).

items.task: IP assignment deed (Nic → Pty: codebases, brands, LCAA)
items.note: BLOCKED on the clause audit. Covers repos, Empathy Ledger / JusticeHub / ALMA, methodologies, design assets.

items.task: Transfer GitHub org ownership to Pty identity
Audit + migrate key SaaS billing to Pty card
items.note: Xero/GHL/Supabase/Vercel/Anthropic/OpenAI/Google Workspace/Notion/Cloudflare/domains (38 vendor patterns in subscription_patterns).

items.task: Stripe subscription migration plan (30+ day customer notice)
items.note: Stripe doesn't move between ABNs; customers re-authenticate. Notify 30+ days before cutover.

items.task: Provision Dext per-project email addresses (top 12 codes)
items.note: Embed project tagging at point of forwarding. Add map to config/dext-project-emails.json.

items.task: Load new-entity credentials into LastPass
items.note: ASIC/ABR/Xero/NAB/Stripe/insurer portals as each is created. Manual — Claude can't write to LastPass.

items.task: Dry-run $1 test invoice from Pty Xero (end-to-end)
items.note: BLOCKED on Pty Xero. Verify tenant + bank + Stripe + project_code tagging + BAS treatment before going live.

items.task: Update email/website/invoice footers to Pty (ABN + ACN)
items.note: On real cutover (Rule 2 — when Pty is genuinely invoice-ready, not an aspirational date).

items.task: Send Standard Ledger decision-pack email + book the call
items.note: Email at thoughts/shared/drafts/2026-06-19-standard-ledger-eofy-questions.md (reframe to proposed positions). Gates every ruling below — fill the SL contact name + send.

items.task: Lock Decision 1 in writing (operating entity = the Pty, Option A)
items.note: Option A: trade from the Pty, holdco-later via Div 615; subsidiary hive-down rejected. Gates novation letters. Record in wiki/decisions/.

items.task: SL ruling: sole-trader → Pty transfer mechanism (50/50 two-trust fork)
items.note: 328-G & 122-A fail on the two-family cap table. Proposed: market-value sale + Div 152 shelter + vendor loan — a FORK from the journal-entry/Path-C model, SL must re-open it. Consider a PBR on the credit-loan-not-Div-7A point.

items.task: Commission independent goodwill + IP + plant valuation
items.note: Cap-of-FME (goodwill) + income approach (IP) + market/WDV (plant), apportioned in the sale agreement. Unlocks the CGT shelter, vendor-loan balance, QLD duty, and equipment GST adjustment.

items.task: Engage QLD duties specialist + budget transfer duty
items.note: Trust shareholders + a new family group may defeat the small-business-restructure exemption ENTIRELY — budget full duty as the conservative case (not self-assessable; QRO).

items.task: Nic: personal deductible super contribution (~$30K) + NAT 71121
items.note: Fund must RECEIVE by 30 Jun → send ~24 Jun. Lodge NAT 71121 + get written acknowledgement before lodging the return. GO conditional on the Div 293 check + cash.

items.task: Both founders pull myGov TSB + carry-forward concessional figures
items.note: TSB <$500K @ 30 Jun 2025 + exact unused cap. Do NOT contribute above $30K without both — excess = marginal rate + interest.

items.task: R&D: physically PAY founder window wages from the Pty by 30 Jun (~$45-60K)
items.note: Associate-payment rule: cash must leave the Pty (PAYG+super received), NOT a journal/loan-credit/round-robin. BLOCKED on NAB live + SL amount. Unpaid amounts carry to FY27 (s355-480) — do NOT s8-1 deduct them.

items.task: Build contemporaneous R&D window activity log per founder (24 Apr–30 Jun)
items.note: The single biggest R&D gap. Hours per registered core activity vs non-R&D. The log sets the apportionment %, NOT the headline 95%/40%.

items.task: Re-frame Path C wording (Pty engages founders to conduct R&D FOR it)
items.note: Current 'sole trader operated on behalf of the Pty' is backwards + dangerous. Claim only post-24-Apr; needs IP assignment effective + dated engagement letters/board minutes; consider a PBR.

items.task: AusIndustry FY26 R&D registration (DISR)
items.note: Hard 10-month deadline. Miss = forfeit FY26 entirely. Via SL + R&D consultant.

items.task: Confirm Knight Photography legal form + GST backdating + PSI posture
items.note: Recommend sole trader (correct the 'partnership' label) SUBJECT to no existing partnership ABN + how Sept-2025 $100K was booked. GST register/backdate (a wash). PSI likely lands income on Ben; ACT deduction safe regardless.

items.task: Pre-30-June discretionary spend (instant asset write-off + prepaid)
items.note: ~$50K combined deducts at sole-trader ~47% (beats Pty 25%). Confirm 12-month-rule prepayment treatment with SL.

items.task: Confirm base-rate-entity 25% classification (FY26 income mix)
items.note: Grants/commercial/R&D are active income; passive income ~0% (<80% ceiling). SL formally classifies each income line.

items.task: Draft Div 7A complying loan agreements (8.37% FY26 benchmark)
items.note: For any in-year debit founder draws: written, 7-yr unsecured, MYR by 30 Jun, in place before the FY26 return lodgement day. Keep the credit (vendor) loan separate.

items.task: QLD payroll-tax grouping check (ACT Pty + future Harvest)
items.note: Not liable FY27 on founder pay alone (~$268.8K << $1.3M) but plan grouping; register within 7 days of first crossing; nominate DGE.

items.task: Trustee distribution resolutions (Knight FT + Marchesi FT, if FY26 income)
items.note: Statutory 30 Jun deadline (no extension). Unsigned → trust taxed at 47%. Confirm whether either trust has FY26 income first.

items.task: Butterfly: DGR/charity lawyer items before 26 Jun handover
items.note: Confirm Butterfly sits BESIDE the group (arm's-length agreements), not under a holdco (CLG = members not shares; control risks PBI/DGR). Already DGR+PBI since 2012.
